channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Matthew Perry's assistant faces sentencing for injecting ketamine that killed actor
item.description: Kenneth Iwamasa pleaded guilty to conspiracy to distribute ketamine resulting in death.

item.title: ICE detainee suicides rise to unprecedented levels, AP investigation finds
item.description: Detainees are taking their own lives at a rate unmatched in the agency's history, highlighting systemic failures, experts say.

item.title: Americans say Democrats don't challenge GOP enough, GOP backs Trump too much: Poll
item.description: Open-ended questions reveal public perceptions of both political parties.

item.title: Five of seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave for over a week found alive
item.description: Rescuers found five villagers alive in a flooded cave in central Laos, but two remain missing.
